description: Letter of appeal for charity. Fragment (upper part only). The op line is in Arabic script (the address?), and the rest in Judaeo-Arabic. The sender asks for two dirhams until after the Sabbath in order to buy bread and a medicinal syrup, for "nothing has entered his mouth."
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
